title: ammophila × baltica
intro: Ammophila × baltica, also known as Baltic beachgrass, is a hybrid of the Ammophila arenaria and Festuca rubra plants that is native to the coastal regions of Northern Europe. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ammophila × baltica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
